product.name: No Tools No Drill Cordless Mini Blinds 20" Wx 36" H, 1" L-Shaped Blades, Horizontal Vinyl Blinds for Indoor Windows, White
features: No Tools No Drill Obtain patent support, Maximum weighing capacity: 30kg, You don't need to leave holes on the wall to affect the beauty of the wall, Very suitable for tenants and landlords.Notice:The actual width of the blinds will be 1/2 inch smaller than the described size.
Blinds are made of vinyl, which is not easy to bend and more durable. And the blinds are cordless, eliminating the hassle of tangled cords and ensuring safety for children and pets.
L-shaped blades are used for blinds and provide 100% shadow. When you don't want the sun to enter the living room, you just need to turn the blind wand to adjust angle of the blade for full shadow.

Blinds can only be installed internally, The ports on both sides of the shutters can be extended outward by 1in. We have a variety of sizes for you to choose from, Please refer to the main picture for detailed dimensions.
Blinds are perfect for use in living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, If you have any questions or dissatisfaction during use, you can contact us at any time and we will solve all problems for you.
